external_basis.claim: Teams should measure delivery and recovery outcomes to prioritize and validate improvement.
external_basis.label: DORA metrics

external_basis.claim: System behavior should be specified as eval tasks with inputs and expected outputs, then measured and iterated.

honesty_label: bounded corpus fixtures with realistic task shapes; not yet full classroom field telemetry or external human review
purpose: Expand the real-task eval harness from bounded synthetic proxies into a reusable real-task corpus and bind the corpus runner as a runtime stage-exit gate.
